title: RoDTEP & RoSCTL Benefits: CBIC Clarifies Short Realisation of Export Proceeds
content:
# RoDTEP & RoSCTL Benefits: CBIC Clarifies Short Realisation of Export Proceeds

Ek important update hai! Government ne RoDTEP (Remission of Duties and Taxes on Exported Products) aur RoSCTL (Rebate of State and Central Taxes and Levies) schemes ke under short realisation of export proceeds par benefits ki eligibility ko lekar clarity provide ki hai.

Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne Circular No. 20/2026-Customs, dated April 10, 2026, issue kiya hai, jisme exporters ke liye kuch significant clarifications di gayi hain.

**Key Clarifications:**

*   **Full FOB Value par Benefits:** Ab exporters in schemes ke तहत full Free on Board (FOB) value par benefits le sakte hain, agency commission aur foreign bank charges ko deduct kiye bina.
*   **Deduction Limit:** Yeh tab possible hoga jab aise deductions (agency commission aur foreign bank charges milakar) FOB value ke 12.5% se zyada na hon.
*   **Excess Deductions:** Agar deductions is 12.5% limit ko cross kar jaate hain, toh jo excess amount hai, usse benefit calculation ke liye FOB value se reduce karna hoga.
*   **ECGC Compensation as Sale Proceeds:** Circular ne yeh bhi clarify kiya hai ki Export Credit Guarantee Corporation (ECGC) se short realisation ke liye mili compensation ko sale proceeds ki receipt mana ja sakta hai.
*   **No Benefit Recovery (Conditions Apply):** Aisi situations mein RoDTEP aur RoSCTL benefits ki recovery nahi ki jayegi, agar Reserve Bank of India (RBI) sale proceeds ke write-off ko permit karta hai, aur exporter concerned Indian Foreign Mission se non-recovery confirm karne wala certificate provide karta hai.
*   **Consistency aur Support:** Iss move ka aim hai in schemes ko existing duty drawback provisions ke saath align karna, consistency ensure karna aur exporters ko practical challenges mein support provide karna.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://taxinformation.cbic.gov.in/view-pdf/1003320/ENG/Circulars)

*Published on: 12 April 2026*
